LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS GARY LINDSEY AND RODGER GARCIA'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST, SECOND, THIRD, FOURTH, FIFTH, SIXTH, SEVENTH, TENTH, ELEVENTH, TWELFTH, THIRTEENTH, FIFTEENTH CAUSES OF ACTION OF THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5, BUT OTHERWISE OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1113 (F) AND LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-11-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
